product_depth.justification: All 5 skill files verified: exist, parse, have correct YAML frontmatter. Index routing table matches all 5 profiles. Criteria mapping verified line by line.

functionality.justification: All 5 verification steps pass: YAML parsing, routing entries, criteria matching, verification methods present, plugin.json path resolution.

visual_design.justification: Consistent section structure across all 5 domain skills. Same section numbering, table formatting, and content organization.

code_quality.justification: All YAML frontmatter valid. All descriptions quoted. Naming conventions consistent (snake_case profiles, criteria). No broken references.

contract_checks.evidence: All 5 SKILL.md files have valid YAML frontmatter with name and quoted description.
Index skill routing table has entries for all 5 profiles: sales, sales_engineering, tender_management, sales_enablement, sales_operations.
Criteria key mapping matches Section 5 headings in each skill: 20 criteria total, all match.
Verification methods table has 5 rows covering all profiles.
Plugin.json skills path ./skills/ resolves to directory with 6 skill directories (index + 5 domain).

feature_evidence.reason: All 5 integration verification steps pass. YAML parses, routing complete, criteria match, verification methods present, plugin.json resolves.

internal_consistency.justification: Cross-skill consistency verified through automated checks.

intentionality.justification: Each domain skill has unique methodologies and anti-patterns.
